ModMetadata.Name: Entropy.Common
ModMetadata.Author: Aberro
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Entropy.Common[/h1]
A Stationeers modding framework and utility library. It contains common code and utilities for Entropy mods, automates configuration handling, provides easy API for drawing ImGUI controls, has various helper types, and more, allowing for faster and easier development of mods.
[b]WARNING:[/b] This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Entropy.Common A Stationeers modding framework and utility library. It contains common code and utilities for Entropy mods, automates configuration handling, provides easy API for drawing ImGUI controls, has various helper types, and more, allowing for faster and easier development of mods. WARNING: This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
